creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Wolfram Schneider from comment #0)

Is man.cgi output rendered by groff? It's been noted that man.cgi now (I'm pretty sure it hasn't in the past, but I don't have definitive proof) chops off nearly all of the bectl(8) manpage, just after it hits the first subsection in the file: https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=bectl&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD+14.0-RELEASE
